odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
BukuRumah Admin Portal
tailwind.config = { darkMode: "class", theme: { extend: { colors: { "primary": "#012425", "on-primary": "#ffffff", "primary-container": "#1a3a3a", "on-primary-container": "#83a4a3", "surface": "#f8f9fa", "on-surface": "#191c1d", "surface-variant": "#e1e3e4", "on-surface-variant": "#414848", "outline": "#717878", "outline-variant": "#c1c8c7", "background": "#f8f9fa", "on-background": "#191c1d", "surface-container": "#edeeef", "surface-container-lowest": "#ffffff", "surface-container-highest": "#e1e3e4", "accent": "#D97706", "accent-hover": "#B45309", }, spacing: { "xl": "64px", "lg": "40px", "md": "24px", "sm": "12px", "xs": "4px", "base": "8px", }, fontFamily: { "headline-md": ["Playfair Display", "serif"], "headline-lg": ["Playfair Display", "serif"], "display": ["Playfair Display", "serif"], "label-sm": ["Inter"], "body-md": ["Inter"], "label-md": ["Inter"], "body-sm": ["Inter"], "body-lg": ["Inter"], }, } } }
menu_book
BukuRumah
Admin Portal
Management
dashboard Dashboard
menu_book Inventory
group User Management
receipt_long Transactions
payments Financial Reports
qr_code_scanner Scan QR Code
logout Logout

div.p: Welcome back. Here's what's happening today.

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 mb-8
bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl p-5 border border-outline-variant/20 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

span.class: material-symbols-outlined text-primary bg-primary/10 p-1.5 rounded-lg text-[18px]

div.class: bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl p-5 border border-outline-variant/20 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

span.class: material-symbols-outlined text-[#1565C0] bg-[#E3F2FD] p-1.5 rounded-lg text-[18px]

div.class: bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl p-5 border border-outline-variant/20 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

span.class: material-symbols-outlined text-[#2E7D32] bg-[#E8F5E9] p-1.5 rounded-lg text-[18px]

div.class: bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl p-5 border border-outline-variant/20 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

span.class: material-symbols-outlined text-accent bg-accent/10 p-1.5 rounded-lg text-[18px]

div.class: lg:col-span-2 bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl border border-outline-variant/20 overflow-hidden
p-5 border-b border-outline-variant/20 flex justify-between items-center

tr.class: bg-[#f9fafb] text-[10px] text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest border-b border-outline-variant/20

th.class: p-3 pl-5 font-semibold
p-3 font-semibold
p-3 font-semibold
p-3 font-semibold
p-3 font-semibold

span.t-attf-class: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase {{ 'bg-[#dcfce7] text-[#166534]' if tx.status in ['completed', 'borrowed'] else 'bg-accent/10 text-accent' if tx.status == 'ready_for_pickup' else 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' }}

div.class: bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl border border-outline-variant/20 p-5 flex flex-col gap-3 h-fit

h3.class: text-lg font-headline-md text-primary border-b border-outline-variant/20 pb-3

a.class: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-primary text-on-primary py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-primary-container transition-colors shadow-sm

w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-surface-container text-on-surface py-2.5 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-surface-variant transition-colors border border-outline-variant/30

div.class: mt-3 p-3 bg-[#f9fafb] rounded-lg border border-outline-variant/20

p.class: text-[10px] font-semibold text-on-surface mb-1.5 uppercase tracking-widest

header.class: flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4 mb-8

div.class: bg-white p-5 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
bg-white p-5 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
bg-white p-5 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20

span.class: material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-outline text-[18px]

input.name: search
input.class: w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-outline-variant bg-white text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none

button.class: bg-primary text-on-primary px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold

div.class: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 overflow-hidden

th.class: p-4 text-[10px] text-on-surface-variant uppercase font-semibold tracking-widest
p-4 text-[10px] text-on-surface-variant uppercase font-semibold tracking-widest
p-4 text-[10px] text-on-surface-variant uppercase font-semibold tracking-widest
p-4 text-[10px] text-on-surface-variant uppercase font-semibold tracking-widest
p-4 text-[10px] text-on-surface-variant uppercase font-semibold tracking-widest
p-4 text-[10px] text-on-surface-variant uppercase font-semibold tracking-widest

div.class: w-10 h-14 bg-surface-variant rounded flex-shrink-0 border border-outline-variant/20 overflow-hidden

span.t-attf-class: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase {{ 'bg-[#dcfce7] text-[#166534]' if book.status == 'available' else 'bg-accent/10 text-accent' if book.status == 'borrowed' else 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' }}

a.class: px-3 py-1 rounded border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant text-xs

a.t-attf-class: px-3 py-1 rounded text-xs {{ 'bg-primary text-on-primary' if p == page else 'border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant' }}

a.class: px-3 py-1 rounded border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant text-xs

div.p: Manage library members, staff roles, and account statuses.

a.class: bg-primary text-on-primary text-sm font-semibold px-5 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary-container transition-colors flex items-center gap-2 shadow-sm

div.class: bg-white rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
bg-white rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
bg-white rounded-xl p-5 shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20

span.class: material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-outline text-[18px]

input.name: search
input.class: w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-outline-variant bg-white text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none

button.class: bg-primary text-on-primary px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold

div.class: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 overflow-hidden

th.class: px-5 py-3 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest
px-5 py-3 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest
px-5 py-3 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest
px-5 py-3 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest
px-5 py-3 text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest text-right

div.class: w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-primary flex items-center justify-center shrink-0

span.class: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-surface-variant text-on-surface text-[10px] uppercase font-bold tracking-wider

span.t-attf-class: w-2 h-2 rounded-full {{ 'bg-[#2E7D32]' if not user.is_suspended else 'bg-red-500' }}

button.t-attf-class: px-3 py-1 rounded text-xs font-semibold transition-colors {{ 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 hover:bg-red-200' if not user.is_suspended else 'bg-[#dcfce7] text-[#166534] hover:bg-[#bbf7d0]' }}

a.t-attf-class: px-3 py-1 rounded {{ 'bg-primary text-on-primary' if p == page else 'border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant' }}

a.class: text-sm text-on-surface-variant hover:text-primary flex items-center gap-1 mb-6

div.class: bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg mb-5 text-sm flex items-center gap-2
bg-[#dcfce7] border border-[#bbf7d0] text-[#166534] px-4 py-3 rounded-lg mb-5 text-sm flex items-center gap-2

form.class: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 p-6 space-y-5

input.name: name
input.class: w-full border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none

input.name: login
input.class: w-full border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none

input.name: password
input.class: w-full border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none

button.class: w-full bg-primary text-on-primary py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-primary-container transition-colors shadow-sm text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2

header.p: Monitor all borrow and purchase activities.

span.class: material-symbols-outlined absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-outline text-[18px]

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by book title, user, or transaction ID...
input.class: w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-outline-variant bg-white text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none

select.name: status
select.class: bg-white border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-primary outline-none

select.name: tx_type
select.class: bg-white border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-primary outline-none

button.class: bg-primary text-on-primary px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold

div.class: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 overflow-hidden

tr.class: bg-[#f9fafb] text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest border-b border-outline-variant/20

div.class: w-8 h-11 bg-surface-variant rounded overflow-hidden shrink-0

span.t-attf-class: px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase {{ 'bg-[#dcfce7] text-[#166534]' if tx.status == 'completed' else 'bg-[#E3F2FD] text-[#1565C0]' if tx.status == 'borrowed' else 'bg-accent/10 text-accent' if tx.status == 'ready_for_pickup' else 'bg-red-100 text-red-700' }}

a.t-attf-class: px-3 py-1 rounded {{ 'bg-primary text-on-primary' if p == page else 'border border-outline-variant hover:bg-surface-variant' }}

header.p: Overview of revenue, transactions, and library economics.

div.class: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-5 mb-8
bg-[#FDFBF7] p-5 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
text-[10px] font-semibold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest mb-2
bg-[#FDFBF7] p-5 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
text-[10px] font-semibold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest mb-2
bg-[#FDFBF7] p-5 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
text-[10px] font-semibold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest mb-2
bg-[#FDFBF7] p-5 rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20
text-[10px] font-semibold text-on-surface-variant uppercase tracking-widest mb-2
bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 p-5
bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 p-5 flex flex-col items-center justify-center
bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 overflow-hidden

tr.class: bg-[#f9fafb] text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-on-surface-variant tracking-widest

th.class: p-4 border-b border-outline-variant/20
p-4 border-b border-outline-variant/20
p-4 border-b border-outline-variant/20
p-4 border-b border-outline-variant/20
p-4 border-b border-outline-variant/20

span.t-attf-class: px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-bold uppercase {{ 'bg-[#dcfce7] text-[#166534]' if tx.status == 'completed' else 'bg-[#E3F2FD] text-[#1565C0]' if tx.status == 'borrowed' else 'bg-accent/10 text-accent' }}

header.p: Scan a member's QR code to confirm book pickup or verify transactions.

div.class: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 p-6

h3.class: text-lg font-headline-md text-primary mb-4 flex items-center gap-2

div.class: w-full aspect-square bg-[#f9fafb] rounded-xl border-2 border-dashed border-outline-variant flex items-center justify-center mb-4 overflow-hidden

button.class: flex-1 bg-primary text-on-primary py-2.5 rounded-lg font-semibold text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-primary-container transition-colors
flex-1 bg-red-100 text-red-700 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-semibold text-sm flex items-center justify-center gap-2 hover:bg-red-200 transition-colors hidden

p.class: text-xs text-on-surface-variant mb-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest

input.class: flex-1 border border-outline-variant rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary outline-none

button.class: bg-primary text-on-primary px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-primary-container transition-colors

div.class: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 p-6 hidden

h3.class: text-lg font-headline-md text-primary mb-4 flex items-center gap-2

div.class: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-outline-variant/20 p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center min-h-[300px]
div.p: Scan a QR code or enter a token to see transaction details.
